activities.label: Emit codex outbound request with first-party fingerprint
activities.description: 組合一組出站請求，讓 OpenAI first-party classifier 辨識為 first-party codex CLI。此為 A0 的頂層功能。
outputs: HTTPS / WSS request with correct headers + body

activities.label: Attach User-Agent + TitleCase account-id to WS upgrade
activities.description: Phase 1 目標：在 WS 升級 header inline 補 UA 與 TitleCase ChatGPT-Account-Id。
outputs: WS upgrade headers 含 UA + TitleCase account-id
controls: DD-1 先 inline 再重構

activities.label: Emit HTTP SSE request (既有路徑，不回歸)
activities.description: 既有已走 buildHeaders 的 HTTP 路徑維持功能。

activities.label: Unify header construction through buildHeaders()
outputs: 統一 header 集合；transport-specific 欄位經 flag 分支產生

activities.label: Subprocess: first WS message body assembly (本 spec 不動)
activities.description: 首訊息 JSON body 組裝維持現狀；與 codex-prompt-rebuild-incremental 未來 spec 銜接點。
mechanisms: C2 transport-ws 的 body 組裝區塊（非 header 區塊）

activities.label: Add x-client-request-id + Accept to HTTP
activities.description: Phase 4：HTTP buildHeaders 新增兩個欄位。

activities.label: Extend BuildHeadersInput with conversationId + isWebSocket
activities.description: Phase 2 / Phase 4 共同擴充：介面欄位新增。

activities.label: Sync refs/codex to rust-v0.125.0-alpha.1 and update CODEX_CLI_VERSION
activities.description: Phase 3：submodule checkout tag + 常數更新 + upstream diff 盤點。
controls: AGENTS.md 外部 plugin 管理

activities.label: Verify via beta worktree + OpenAI 官網後台人工查看
activities.description: Acceptance：beta 驗證 → 第三方判定比例 < 1% → fetch-back。
outputs: 驗證通過 / 未通過決策
